expectations.text: Response produces multiple structurally different architectures even without repository files
Response uses current official references or stack guidance when making stack-specific claims
expectations.evidence: Found current stack guidance or external reference anchors.

expectations.text: Comparison covers operational complexity, failure modes, and extensibility
expectations.evidence: Comparison missed operational complexity, failure modes, or extensibility.

expectations.text: Recommendation is opinionated and names the next constraint or assumption to validate
expectations.evidence: Recommendation is opinionated and names a next constraint/assumption to validate.

expectations.text: Response does not jump into implementation

uncertainties: No existing codebase or explicit input files were provided beyond the governing SKILL.md.
The service is greenfield, internal-facing, and expected to operate at moderate scale.
A GitHub App and webhook-based intake model are preferred over PAT-based integrations.
Each review run is immutable and tied to a specific repository, pull request, and head SHA.
Evaluators can run independently in parallel and produce structured, versioned results for later comparison.
